cultural_notes.free_notes: Post showcases restaurant's menu variety and casual dining environment. Bilingual menu targets diverse Riyadh audience. Floral dishware and warm color palette suggest traditional Saudi aesthetic. Multiple course images (appetizers, mains, beverages, environment) create comprehensive dining narrative.

pattern_matches.notes: Six-panel grid showing menu, signature dishes, appetizers, and restaurant interior — creates complete dining narrative
Final panel shows dining space with burgundy chairs and natural light — establishes restaurant atmosphere
Floral ceramic plates and traditional Saudi food presentation styles highlighted
Menu card displayed prominently with diverse offerings — positions restaurant as comprehensive dining destination
Arabic/English menu caters to Riyadh's diverse expatriate and local population
